tweets.full_text:
Claude Fable 5 is our first generally available Mythos-class model. 

It ships with new safety classifiers that may flag certain prompts in dual-use domains like cyber and bio.

We've added fallbacks: a refused request retries on Claude Opus 4.8 instead of dead-ending. https://t.co/iL1Rd6H5pJ

tweets.full_text:
If you've adopted AI at your company but haven't seen any tangible results, read this 1990 article: "The Dynamo and the Computer" by Paul David.

When electricity first arrived, factories that "adopted" it barely got faster. They just swapped the steam engine for an electric one https://t.co/aJbYGR41VW
tweets.summary: 作者引用1990年Paul David论文《The Dynamo and the Computer》，类比电力革命说明AI采用初期难见成效的原因——企业仅做表面替换，未真正重构流程。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：解释为什么AI投入没有回报
angles: 为什么你的AI投入没有回报？这篇1990年论文说透了
